details: Found docs-only workspace with no Git metadata, no AGENTS.md, no CONTEXT.md, and no package scaffold.
Created CONTEXT.md and AGENTS.md using the PRD, technical specification, and roadmap as source documents.
Created pnpm workspace scaffold with clew-schema, clew-core, clew-cli, clew-importers, clew-exporters, and clew-mcp packages.
Updated root scripts to invoke pnpm through Corepack because no global pnpm binary is available on PATH.
Moved TypeScript rootDir/outDir into per-package configs and allowed empty Vitest suites during scaffold bootstrap.
Ran corepack pnpm check, corepack pnpm test, and corepack pnpm build successfully.
Read docs/clew_Build_handoff.md after initialization; next implementation step is clew-schema.
